MOKOUMOD-THE_MEDICINE_SELLER.title: The Medicine Seller
MOKOUMOD-THE_MEDICINE_SELLER_MOKOU.pages:
While passing through a forest, a familiar sigh catches your attention. [purple]Reisen[/purple] is sitting by the roadside, her ears drooping.

"[red]Mokou[/red]?! It's so good to see a familiar face! I headed out to sell medicine as usual, but somehow ended up in this place with weird bugs and beasts. Do you know how to get out of here?"

"If you mean leaving these woods, just go that way. If you mean returning to Gensokyo, I have no idea." You shrug.

[purple]Reisen[/purple] lets out another deep sigh. "As I thought... Are you continuing upward? Good luck, then. I might have something here that can help you."

"Yes, I am aware that I am carrying this dangerous elixir. No, I really have no clue where it came from. You are probably the only one here unaffected by it, so please take it."

You thank [purple]Reisen[/purple] and accept the Hourai Elixir. After walking a short distance away, you hear a soft mutter, "Someone save me from this hellhole..."

"A medicine case? I do have a small one that I can spare. I'll sell it to you cheap. Running into someone else in a place like this is a stroke of luck already."

You thank [purple]Reisen[/purple] and accept the small case. After walking a short distance away, you hear a soft mutter, "Someone save me from this hellhole..."
MOKOUMOD-THE_MEDICINE_SELLER.pages.INITI:
While passing through a forest, a girl's sigh nearby catches your attention. A [purple]purple-haired girl[/purple] is sitting by the roadside, looking defeated.

"Oh, someone's here. Greetings, I originally intended to go to the Human Village to sell medicine, but somehow ended up here. Do you by chance know how to get out of here?"

You point her toward the path leading back to the bottom of the Spire.

"Thank you. Though, I wanted to go back to Gensokyo... No. It's nothing, please don't worry about it. As a thanks, I should have something here that can help you."
MOKOUMOD-THE_MEDICINE_SELLER.pages.ACCEP:
"This is a special elixir handmade by Master. It was originally meant to be sold, but I doubt anyone here would buy it anyway. Please, take it."

You thank the [purple]purple-haired girl[/purple] and accept the elixir. After walking a short distance away, you hear a soft mutter, "Someone save me from this hellhole..."
MOKOUMOD-THE_MEDICINE_SELLER.pages.BUY_C:
"A medicine case? I do have a small one that I can spare. I'll sell it to you cheap. Running into someone else in a place like this is a stroke of luck already."

You thank the [purple]purple-haired girl[/purple] and accept the small case. After walking a short distance away, you hear a soft mutter, "Someone save me from this hellhole..."
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.title: Danmaku Time
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.INITIAL.desc:
On a sunny afternoon, you spot two girls chatting not far away. Noticing you, the [red]lady in red[/red] waves you over.

"Have you ever heard of a 'Danmaku Duel'? It's quite different from normal combat. It focuses more on the elegance and beauty of demonstration, and it's usually non-lethal." the [blue]lady in blue[/blue] explains with a smile.

"We were just about to have one. Care to join?" The [red]lady in red[/red] winks, full of anticipation.

"You don't have to force yourself. Just spectating is perfectly fine too."
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.INITIAL.opti: Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP. Add a [gold]Returning Phoenix[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.TALK.descrip:
Though it sounds quite interesting, you decide to just watch for now.

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You closely observe their Danmaku patterns and footwork, learning quite a few offensive and evasive techniques.

After it concludes, you thank the two of them and set off on your journey once more.
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.FIGHT_IRONCL:
"Well then, [sine]here we go~[/sine]"

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You attempt to unleash: [red][jitter]Flame Sign "Fiend Fire"[/jitter][/red]. "So it's the same type of Danmaku as mine!" The [red]lady in red[/red] seems hyped. Although you are inevitably hit a few times, you can tell that both of them are holding back on purpose.

The duel concludes. It was a fun new way to fight. You sit down to catch your breath.
"A truly respectable opponent." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] commends. "Agreed. We'll lend you our strength." The [red]lady in red[/red] pats you on the shoulder.

You feel two distinct powers surging into your body.
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.FIGHT_SILENT:
"Well then, [sine]here we go~[/sine]"

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You attempt to unleash: [green][jitter]Shiv Sign "Knife Trap"[/jitter][/green]. "Not bad. Reminds me of a certain chief maid." The [red]lady in red[/red] nods in approval. Although you are inevitably hit a few times, you can tell that both of them are holding back on purpose.

The duel concludes. It was a fun new way to fight. You sit down to catch your breath.
"A truly respectable opponent." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] commends. "Agreed. We'll lend you our strength." The [red]lady in red[/red] pats you on the shoulder.

You feel two distinct powers surging into your body.

The duel concludes. It was a fun new way to fight. You sit down to catch your breath.
"A truly respectable opponent." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] commends. "Agreed. We'll lend you our strength." The [red]lady in red[/red] pats you on the shoulder.

MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME.pages.FIGHT.descri:
"Well then, [sine]here we go~[/sine]"

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You attempt to launch a Danmaku in your own way while carefully dodging theirs, but you are still inevitably hit a few times. However, you can tell that both of them are holding back on purpose.

The duel concludes. It was a fun new way to fight. You sit down to catch your breath.
"A truly respectable opponent." The [blue]lady in blue[/blue] commends. "Agreed. We'll lend you our strength." The [red]lady in red[/red] pats you on the shoulder.

You feel two distinct powers surging into your body.
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME_MOKOU.pages.INITIA:
On a cozy afternoon, you and [blue]Keine[/blue], whom you ran into earlier, get to talking about Danmaku Duels.

"Would you like me to educate you on the history of Spell Card rules?" [blue]Keine[/blue] smiles, leaving you entirely unsure if she's joking or not.

"Ugh, spare me..."
Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP. Add a [gold]Returning Phoenix[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME_MOKOU.pages.TALK.d:
After discussing some tactics, the two of you fall into casual conversation.

"[blue]Keine[/blue], even though you are a teacher, your combat strength is quite formidable."

"I am a half-beast after all, instincts to fight are simply born within me. Still, to protect everyone in the Human Village, as well as someone [red][b]important to me[/b][/red], I make sure to train properly."

You blush slightly.
"A Danmaku Duel? Sure! It's been a while since we had one." [blue]Keine[/blue] gladly accepts your proposition.

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You carefully evade [blue]Keine[/blue]'s Danmaku, though you are inevitably hit a few times. However, you know very well that [blue]Keine[/blue] is holding back on purpose, just as you are.

That was incredibly satisfying! You wipe the sweat from your brow. [blue]Keine[/blue] sits down next to you. "Come to think of it, why don't we have a Dual Spell Card? You have one with so many others."
"Well, want to try creating one?" You feel a part of [blue]Keine[/blue]'s power flow into your body, blending seamlessly with your own.
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME_KEINE.pages.INITIA:
On a cozy afternoon, you and [red]Mokou[/red], whom you ran into earlier, get to talking about Danmaku Duels.

"Would you like me to educate you on the history of Spell Card rules?" You smile, deliberately hiding the fact that you're joking.

"Ugh, spare me..."
Lose [red]{HpLoss}[/red] [gold]Non-Lethal[/gold] HP. Add a [gold]Returning Phoenix[/gold] to your [gold]deck[/gold].
MOKOUMOD-DANMAKU_TIME_KEINE.pages.TALK.d:
After discussing some tactics, the two of you fall into casual conversation.

"[blue]Keine[/blue], even though you is a teacher, your combat strength is quite formidable."

"I am a half-beast after all, instincts to fight are simply born within me. Still, to protect everyone in the Human Village, as well as someone [red][b]important to me[/b][/red], I make sure to train properly."

A slight blush appears on [red]Mokou[/red]'s cheeks. What absolute bliss.
"A Danmaku Duel? Sure! It's been a while since we had one." You gladly accept [red]Mokou[/red]'s proposition.

In the next instant, feathers and bullets [rainbow][sine]dance and flutter through the air[/sine][/rainbow], causing nearby critters to [jitter]scatter in all directions[/jitter]. You carefully evade [red]Mokou[/red]'s Danmaku, though you are inevitably hit a few times. However, you know very well that [red]Mokou[/red] is holding back on purpose, just as you are.

That was deeply exhilarating! You sit down next to [red]Mokou[/red]. "Come to think of it, why don't we have a Dual Spell Card? You have one with so many others."
"Well, want to try creating one?" You feel a part of [red]Mokou[/red]'s power flow into your body, blending seamlessly with your own.
